CONFERENCE WITH REAL PROPERTY NEGOTIATORS (Gov. llmResponse.agenda_changes: No formal agenda changes announced. Dr. Baker provided clarification regarding Orion Co-op TK class placement during oral communications, but this was not framed as an agenda change.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Is there a motion to approve the consent items? I move to approve the consent items. Okay, that was a second from Jen. Uh, all in favor? Aye.
